replay.guidanceText:
CRITICAL RETRY GUIDANCE — OPENING PRESERVATION:
The previous attempt removed, obscured, cropped, or concealed an existing opening.
Preserve all windows and doors.
Do not place furniture, artwork, wall panels, decorative features, cabinetry, or staging elements in positions that conceal openings.
Ensure all original openings remain clearly visible and structurally unchanged.

CRITICAL RETRY GUIDANCE — ENVELOPE PRESERVATION:
Preserve all walls, ceilings, bulkheads, trims, architectural features, and room geometry exactly as they appear in the original image.

locations: window opening in the right side of the near wall

advisorySignals: envelope_confirmed_structural_change: A distinct wall indentation/recess visible on the left wall in the baseline image has been filled, resulting in a continuous flat wall surface in the staged image. This represents a structural modification to the architectural envelope.

reasons: Gemini structure: A Tier 1 structural opening (window) present in the BEFORE image has been removed and replaced by a solid wall in the AFTER image., The identity of a wall surface has changed from containing an opening to being a continuous solid surface.

fixture.reason: All fixed architectural elements and fixtures are preserved. Furniture and decor changes are permitted.

floor.reason: The structural floor material is carpet in both images and remains unchanged. A rug has been added in the staged image, which is a non-structural change.

envelope.reason: envelope_corner_flattened: wall-plane corner collapsed – two planes merged into single surface. envelope_vertical_edge_loss: envelope_confirmed_structural_change: Multiple window openings visible in the baseline image have been removed and replaced with continuous flat wall surfaces in the staged image. Specifically, the window on the left wall and the window on the right wall are gone. Additionally, one of the two windows on the back wall in the baseline image is gone. This constitutes a significant alteration of the architectural envelope and wall plane continuity.
advisorySignals: envelope_confirmed_structural_change: Multiple window openings visible in the baseline image have been removed and replaced with continuous flat wall surfaces in the staged image. Specifically, the window on the left wall and the window on the right wall are gone. Additionally, one of the two windows on the back wall in the baseline image is gone. This constitutes a significant alteration of the architectural envelope and wall plane continuity.

envelope_confirmed_structural_change: Multiple window openings visible in the baseline image have been removed and replaced with continuous flat wall surfaces in the staged image. Specifically, the window on the left wall and the window on the right wall are gone. Additionally, one of the two windows on the back wall in the baseline image is gone. This constitutes a significant alteration of the architectural envelope and wall plane continuity.
